text: The department may appoint license examiners for any county in this state to conduct local examinations for all types of drivers’ licenses. markdown:
## Title 42
#### Article 2. Drivers’ Licenses
##### § 42-2-113 — License examiners appointed

The department may appoint license examiners for any county in this state to conduct local examinations for all types of drivers’ licenses. The officers of the department shall conduct the examination as prescribed by law for all drivers in the county and collect the fees as provided in section 42-2-114 and remit the same to the department, which shall transfer the same to the credit of the highway users tax fund.
